framework.name: AP2 as Open Standard Positioning Strategy
framework.description: Google explicitly positioning AP2 as 'open-source' and 'non-proprietary' to become the standard protocol rather than a proprietary gatekeeper. Emphasizes community contribution, GitHub-based development, and interoperability with existing agent protocols (A2A, MCP).
framework.raw_quote: First is openness and interoperability. This is a non-proprietary open extension for A2A and MCP. It fosters a competitive environment where anyone can innovate.
